new_claims.claim_text: Trump threatens to blockade ships entering or exiting Iranian ports on April 13 at 10:00 A.M. ET.
new_claims.notes: Threat of blockade by President Trump, with a specific time mentioned. Related to geopolitical rhetoric and international law implications.

updated_claims.notes: Posts from @Osint613 and @FoxNews confirm Trump's threat of a blockade of Iranian ports on April 13. This provides context to the claim of the Strait of Hormuz being effectively closed, but does not confirm actual closure.
